title: Basic Metabolic Panel (BMP): MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
These are different enzymes (proteins that speed up certain chemical reactions in your body) made by the liver. 
Bilirubin , a waste product made by the liver 
Your provider may order a CMP instead of a BMP to get a more complete picture of the health of your organs or to check for liver disease or other specific conditions.
